category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an installer for Quilt for the vanilla launcher; QuiltMC official site describes Quilt as a Minecraft modding toolchain.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is quilt-installer; official QuiltMC GitHub repository listing names quilt-installer as the Quilt installer.
docs_sources: Official QuiltMC install pages document direct, client, server, GUI, and CLI installation with the Quilt installer.
repo_sources: Official QuiltMC GitHub organization repository listing describes QuiltMC/quilt-installer as the installer for official launcher and servers.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies an installer; source_facts.executables lists quilt-installer; QuiltMC install docs cover Minecraft client/server installation.
